fields.description: Automatically generate follow-up question suggestions after each agent response.
fields.label: Enable Follow-up Suggestions

fields.description: Enable streaming responses for this provider. Requires OpenAI-compatible streaming API.
fields.label: Supports Streaming

fields.description: Model used for tool routing embeddings (e.g., text-embedding-3-small). When set, tool routing uses embedding similarity instead of an LLM call. Leave empty to keep LLM-based routing.
fields.label: Embedding Model

fields.description: Separate API URL for embeddings endpoint. Leave empty to use the main API URL. Required when the primary provider (e.g., DeepSeek) does not support an embeddings API.
fields.label: Embedding API URL

fields.description: Separate API key for the embeddings provider. Leave empty to use the main API key. Required when the primary provider (e.g., DeepSeek) does not support embeddings and a different provider (e.g., OpenAI) is used via Embedding API URL.
fields.label: Embedding API Key

fields.description: Default temperature for this provider (0‑1.5). Recommended values: Coding/Math: 0.0, Data Cleaning/Analysis: 1.0, General Conversation/Translation: 1.3, Creative Writing/Poetry: 1.5. Leave empty to use default value of 1.0. Ignored when thinking mode is enabled.
fields.label: Temperature

fields.description: Enable thinking/reasoning mode (DeepSeek's chain-of-thought). When enabled, the model shows its reasoning process before the final answer. Temperature and top_p are ignored when thinking is active.
fields.label: Enable Thinking Mode

fields.description: Controls how much effort the model spends on reasoning before answering. 'high' is recommended for most tasks; 'max' uses maximum reasoning depth.
fields.label: Reasoning Effort

fields.description: Maximum number of recent assistant messages whose reasoning_content is echoed back to the LLM. Older reasoning blocks are stripped at read time to save context tokens. Range: 1-20. Default: 5.
fields.label: Max Reasoning Turns

fields.description: Default system prompt for all sessions using this provider. Can be overridden per session.
fields.label: System Prompt

fields.description: Maximum tokens the model can generate per response. Default: 384000 (recommended for thinking models).
fields.label: Max Output Tokens

fields.description: Maximum total tokens (prompt + completion) the model supports. Default: 1000000. DeepSeek supports up to 1M tokens for compatible models.
fields.label: Context Length

fields.description: Percentage of context length at which to automatically summarize conversation (50-95). Default: 85%.
fields.label: Auto Summary Threshold (%)

fields.description: Cost per 1 million input tokens (€). Copy from provider pricing page (e.g., DeepSeek: 0.14).
fields.label: Input Cost per 1M Tokens (€)

fields.description: Cost per 1 million output tokens (€). Copy from provider pricing page (e.g., DeepSeek: 0.28).
fields.label: Output Cost per 1M Tokens (€)

fields.description: Cost per 1 million tokens when cache is hit (€). Copy from provider pricing page (e.g., DeepSeek: 0.0028).
fields.label: Cache Hit Cost per 1M Tokens (€)

fields.description: Currency for all pricing fields on this provider.
fields.label: Currency

fields.description: Maximum file size (in MB) allowed for content extraction. Files larger than this will be skipped. Default: 50 MB.
fields.label: Max File Size (MB)
